settings.title: Settings Center
settings.devModeDesc: Enable unpacked plugin loading in sandbox
settings.pluginSecurityDesc: Control the isolation level for third-party plugins. Higher security reduces compatibility. Developer mode removes all isolation.
settings.pluginSecurityRestartReq: Please restart GETSSH to clear malicious code from memory and apply Safe Mode.
settings.antiGlareDesc: Enable dark high contrast for terminal text
settings.author: Author
settings.restartDesc: Changes to rendering parameters may require an application restart to take effect.
settings.auditDesc: Read-only history of connection metadata. No keypresses or console output are stored.
settings.exportHint: Exporting requires a Master Password to protect passwords and private key paths with AES-256 encryption. Hostnames and usernames will be exported in plain text for readability.
settings.exportNeedPwd: Export requires a Master Password. Please set one above in 'SafeStorage Configuration'.
settings.exportTooltipDisabled: Please set a Master Password before exporting
settings.importHint: If the export file is encrypted, enter the master password to decrypt credentials; otherwise, leave blank.
settings.importInvalidFormat: Invalid file format. Please select a GETSSH exported JSON file.
settings.importPwdRequired: This file is encrypted. Please enter the master password.
settings.importSuccessEmpty: ✅ File read successfully, but no new profiles to import.

security.warningPlaintext: DANGER: Once disabled, all your SSH passwords and configs will be stored in plain text on local disk!
security.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke trust for this host? Next connection will require manual verification.
security.errIncorrectPwd: Security Check Failed: Incorrect current password!
security.privacyModeDesc: When GETSSH loses focus, its window will be heavily blurred.
security.autoLockTimeoutDesc: Automatically lock GETSSH after a period of inactivity to prevent unauthorized access.
security.globalInitScriptDesc: Commands to automatically execute sequentially when connecting to any session.
security.pwdUpdated: ✅ Master password securely updated and profiles re-encrypted!
security.pwdDisabled: ⚠️ Encryption disabled. Profiles are now stored in plain text.

appearance.glassmorphismOnlyDark: Glassmorphism is only available in Dark Mode
appearance.importFail: Failed to parse theme. Please ensure it's a valid JSON format.

terminal.fontFamilyDesc: Font family used in terminal (e.g. Fira Code, monospace)
terminal.scrollbackDesc: Number of history lines kept in memory
terminal.scrollbackNote: Note: Modifying scrollback typically only applies to new tabs.
terminal.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy highlighted text to system clipboard
terminal.terminalPaddingDesc: Inner spacing of the terminal container (0-32px)
terminal.cursorBlinkDesc: Enable or disable cursor blinking animation

ssh.keepAliveDesc: Periodic heartbeats to prevent timeouts (0 to disable).
ssh.copyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy highlighted text to system clipboard.

system.confirmQuitDesc: Show confirmation dialog before fully closing the application.
system.globalHotkeyDesc: Press this anywhere to show or hide the terminal (Supports: Command, Control, Option, Shift).

plugins.dropzone: Drag and drop plugin .zip files here to install

sidebar.emptyState: Select or create a session to connect

protocol.label: Protocol
protocol.autoDesc: Auto-detects protocol from input. Supports ssh:// telnet:// user@host formats.
protocol.localHint: Launches the host system's default shell. No network configuration required.
protocol.telnetHint: Plaintext Telnet, suitable for managing Cisco/Huawei network devices. Terminal type is auto-locked to vt100.
protocol.tooltipAuto: Recommended. Automatically detects and matches the correct protocol based on your input or URL prefix (ssh://, telnet://).
protocol.tooltipSsh: Used for remote Linux/Unix servers and cloud instances (AWS, Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud). Encrypted and highly secure. Most common.
protocol.tooltipLocal: Launches your machine's native shell within a tab. macOS opens Zsh/Bash; Windows opens PowerShell/CMD. No network required.
protocol.tooltipTelnet: Used for legacy network hardware (Cisco, Huawei switches/routers/firewalls). Transmits in cleartext — recommended for trusted intranets or hardware debugging only.

welcome.title: Welcome to GETSSH
welcome.subtitle: Select a session from the sidebar or create a new connection
welcome.whereTo: Where do you want to go?
welcome.noSavedSessions: No saved sessions. Add one in the sidebar.
welcome.searchPlaceholder: Filter sessions or type user@host to quick connect...
welcome.quickConnectHint: Press Enter to quick connect to this host...

sftp.title: SFTP File Explorer
sftp.disabledHint: SFTP is only available when connected to an instance
sftp.name: Name
sftp.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

about.title: About GETSSH
about.author: Author: Shen Jiangchen
about.tagline: GETSSH Terminal Platform v1.3.1 (Build K9V2X) - Secure Sandbox Core.
about.openSourceDesc: GETSSH is built upon robust open-source foundations including xterm.js, ssh2, React, and Zustand. View the Third-Party Licenses document for a complete registry of OSS components and their respective licenses.

hostKey.title: Security Warning
hostKey.msg1: The authenticity of host <1>{{hostname}}</1> can't be established.
hostKey.msg3: Are you sure you want to continue connecting?

update.found:
🎉 New version found: {{version}}!

A new update is available. You will be redirected to download it.
update.latest: ✅ You are already on the latest version!
update.bannerDesc: A new version is ready. Upgrade to experience the latest features and fixes.
